template_data.lead_html: A 47-point checklist. One wrong NAICS code. Three years undetected.

rows.what_html: NAICS code audit — the field that determines who finds you in search
UEI / CAGE cross-check — one mismatch triggers a manual review delay
Bank routing verification — wrong here, every payment post-award is delayed

template_data.closer: SAM DOESN'T FLAG ERRORS. IT JUST ACCEPTS THEM.
template_data.image_prompt: Infographic alert layout. Bold warning headline top: 'SAM.GOV DOESN'T FLAG YOUR ERRORS' with orange caution icon. Left side: illustrated professional in blazer reviewing a laptop screen with SAM.gov-style interface. Right side: three rows, each with a short 2-3 word label and an orange warning dot: 'NAICS CHECK', 'UEI MATCH', 'BANK ROUTING'. Bottom dark navy banner with short callout: 'IT JUST ACCEPTS'. Footer text: 'Josh Ladick · GSA Focus'.
